component.name: ccgui
component.summary: AI coding workspace for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Gemini

description.p: ccgui is a Tauri desktop workspace for AI-assisted development with support for Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode CLI, Gemini CLI, built-in terminals, Git tooling, kanban boards, and planning panels.
This Flatpak builds ccgui from source and disables the upstream self-updater so application updates stay on the Flatpak repository workflow.
